description: From the manufacturer Hammerite Direct to Rust Exterior Hammered Spray Paint, Silver Flawless, long-lasting, hammered effect finish Keeping its sheen through all seasons, Hammerite Direct to Rust Metal Paint is a durable, decorative coating for ferrous and non-ferrous metals that provides up to 8 years of protection against rust, corrosion and UV damage. Save time on preparation Paint straight onto rusty metal surfaces with a unique 3-in-1 formula that needs no primer, undercoat or topcoat. It's so easy to restore, decorate and protect your metals and get a perfect finish every time. HOW TO USE Remove all loose rust and flaking paint with a wire brush Wash and rinse with clean water and allow to dry Shake can vigorously and spray directly onto metal from 15cm distance For best results, apply 3-4 coats of Hammerite Leave to dry for 15 minutes between coats DIRECT TO RUST Made with an innovative formula, Hammerite Direct to Rust instantly provides the ultimate protection for your metals with no need for lengthy pre-treatment. ALKYD TECHNOLOGY Unique alykd technology forms a touch barrier for long-lasting metal protection from water, frost, sunlight and rust. 3-IN-1 PAINT Undercoat, primer and topcoat in one. Apply directly to rusty metals to quickly and effectively transform your home and garden with the perfect finish – first time, every time.
